subcodes.title: Words to Louis Gregory, spoken on 1911-04-13
subcodes.first_line: One of the Babis had a vision in which he saw a passage from the Qur'an written in English upon an arch beneath which sat the Shah.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @accounts of dreams and visions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
